commands.name: setup
commands.description: Initialize PWM LED pin and brightness parameters.

commands.name: set_brightness
commands.description: Set LED brightness from 0 to max_value.

commands.name: blink
commands.description: Blink the LED at the given brightness.

commands.name: fade
commands.description: Fade LED brightness up and down.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Run one fade cycle to verify PWM output.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Return driver metadata and current configuration.
